task: I’ve got a coworker trying to dump the closing jobs on me again right as the shift is winding down. I need a reply that keeps it from becoming a back-and-forth while still making the handoff clear.

turns.agent_response:
Try:

**“I’m taking my closing section now — I can’t take extra jobs. I’ll finish my assigned close and leave a quick note on anything important.”**

If you want, I can make it **firmer** or **more casual**.

user_simulator.text:
Close, but make it shorter and less soft. Something like:

"I’m on my close already. Can’t pick up extra. If it matters, put it in writing."

Keeps it done. No opening for a debate.

turns.agent_response:
That works. If you want it even tighter, use:

**“I’m on my close already. Can’t take extra. Put it in writing if it matters.”**

If you want, I can make it a little more blunt.

user_simulator.text: Yeah. That’s tight enough. Keeps it on them, not a debate.
